name: Goal! Carousel (FIFA goal-moment, language-aware)
aesthetic: Football scoreboard editorial — stencil-cut celebration word stacks, trophy/dish hero with overlaid stencil text, hand-drawn squiggle accent, scoreboard chrome (country codes, lat/long-style numerics, wordmark), restaurant-card swap of the classic player-card. Adapted from Vini Jr / Copa América goal celebration motion graphic.
reference: User-supplied 'CF Gol Vini Jr Copa América 2024' video.

goal_word_by_team._note: Celebration word the fans actually shout. Picked by team, not by tournament.

fonts.stencil: Big Shoulders Stencil Display 800/900 (celebration word stacks + 'THIS IS')

slides.subject: Primary bg. Three stacked stencil celebration words (GOL/GOAL/BUT/TOR/etc.) alternating secondary/white, navy squiggle threading between rows. Top tracker bar: team codes + wordmark.
Dark tertiary bg with full-bleed dish/trophy photo dimmed by overlay. Three white stencil celebration words centered with thin tracker lines crossing horizontally.

Secondary bg with gigantic primary stencil celebration word stack bleeding off edges. Centered primary-colored rounded card with dish/restaurant photo, vertical sideways restaurant name in tertiary stencil along left edge.

Tertiary bg with dot-pattern rails. Big primary stencil 'THIS IS' top-right, '{DIASPORA}' bottom bleeding. Centered dish cutout with primary border. White stencil celebration word overlay across dish.
Tertiary bg with primary/secondary diagonal stripe band. White rounded plaque with BiteMap logo + 'find it on' eyebrow + tagline + App Store + Google Play badges.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'find it on' / BiteMap logo / tagline / badges

inputs_required.teamCode: 3-letter team code (BRA, ARG, MEX, FRA, GER, JPN, KOR, etc.) — drives palette AND goalWord
inputs_required.goalWord: Optional override; defaults to goal_word_by_team[teamCode]. Must match the language fans actually shout.
inputs_required.diaspora: UPPERCASE diaspora label for slide 4 (e.g. BRASIL, MÉXICO, FRANCE)

copy_rules: goalWord is ALWAYS in the language of the scoring team — never substitute English when another language is native
If teamCode is not in goal_word_by_team, fall back to 'GOAL' (English)
Stretched variants on slide 4 (e.g. GOOOL for MAR, GOOOAL for GHA) are OK — they read as celebration-length
Restaurant name lives in the dish-card vertical text and @handle only — never in the word stack
Tracker numerics (-5, 37, -9) are decorative scoreboard chrome; keep them in mono
asset_rules: Hero dish photo (slide 2) — high-res, treats well under dark overlay
Dish-card photo (slide 3) — fits vertical card aspect (4:5 ish)
Dish cutout (slide 4) — transparent background ideal so celebration text reads through cleanly
use_when: Reactive: team scores during FIFA 2026 — post within 30 min to the diaspora neighbourhood
Diaspora-restaurant spotlight tied to a specific national team
